content.json:
## StratoSecure — SOC Code Context

Correlate code-level findings with active Sentinel incidents. Identify affected applications and OWASP risk categories.

content.query:
StratoSecure_Findings_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Severity}' == 'All' or Severity == '{Severity}'
| project TimeGenerated, FindingId, Title, Severity, ApplicationId, FilePath, OwaspCategory, FixStatus
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent Findings

content.query:
StratoSecure_Findings_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize count() by OwaspCategory
| where isnotempty(OwaspCategory)
| order by count_ desc
| take 10
content.title: Top OWASP Categories

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Status != 'Closed'
| project IncidentNumber, Title, Severity, Status, TimeGenerated
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20
content.title: Active Sentinel Incidents
